sentences.translation: Ljudi su čuli: «Ovaj svijet je njiva za onaj svijet».
sentences.translationEn: People heard: «This world is the field for the next world».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ أَفْعَالَنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا تُحَدِّدُ مَا يَنْتَظِرُنَا.
sentences.translation: To znači da naša djela na ovom svijetu određuju šta nas čeka.
sentences.translationEn: This means that our actions in this world determine what awaits us.

sentences.arabic: أَحْسَنَ خَلِيلٌ إِلَى النَّاسِ طَوَالَ حَيَاتِهِ.
sentences.translation: Halil je činio dobro ljudima tokom cijelog života.
sentences.translationEn: Khalil was good to people throughout his life.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا احْتَاجَ إِلَى مُسَاعَدَةٍ وَجَدَ كَثِيرًا مِنَ النَّاسِ حَوْلَهُ.
sentences.translation: Kad mu je trebala pomoć, pronašao je mnogo ljudi oko sebe.
sentences.translationEn: When he needed help, he found many people around him.
